title: Embed types definition for storybook metadata and embed configurations
purpose: Defines the TypeScript interfaces for embed objects and storybook metadata used in the UI application.
module_context: Exports two interfaces: StorybookMetadata containing storybook identification and port information, and Embed containing embed configuration with optional storybook metadata.

steps.content: Define the structure for storybook metadata with story identifier and port number.
Define the structure for embed configuration including identifier, name, URL, and optional properties.
Specify that subtype can be 'storybook' or undefined.
Define optional width and height properties for embed dimensions.
Include creation timestamp for embed objects.
Add optional storybook metadata property for storybook-specific configurations.
